title: Blob upload endpoint has no size limit
description: POST /jmap/upload/:account_id with a valid token accepts an unbounded body (body: Bytes is fully materialized before any size check). A token holder can POST gigabytes in a single request, exhausting disk space and crashing or hanging the daemon. Fix: add a ContentLengthLimit extractor or axum::body::Body::with_limit() before materializing the bytes.
